headline: Apollo’s Slok Warns of Dollar’s Vulnerability to an AI Pullback
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The dollar’s recent gains are at risk if the selloff in artificial intelligence stocks deepens, according to Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok.
